connect.title: Connect your ad accounts
connect.subtitle: Connect the platforms you advertise on.
connect.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect?

status.emergencyStopBody: This will immediately pause {count} active campaign(s) across all platforms. All advertising will stop.
status.budgetEffectImmediate: This will take effect immediately on your ad platform.

empty.welcomeBody: Your campaigns are ready to launch. Once live, this screen will show real-time spend, ROAS, platform health, and AI actions. Have questions? Use the chat button in the bottom-right corner — I'm here 24/7.
empty.readyToLaunchBody: Vigmis analyzed your site and built a campaign plan. Click Launch to create your campaigns on Google, Meta, and TikTok.
empty.noAnalyticsBody: Data will appear once your campaigns are live and running. Launch campaigns from the Overview tab.
empty.noCampaignsBody: Go to the Overview tab and click "Launch Campaigns" to get started.
empty.noVideos: No videos generated yet — write a script above and click "Preview Brief →"
empty.noAudiencesBody: Click "Discover Audiences" to find profitable segments for your campaigns.
empty.noThemesBody: Click "Analyze Themes" to surface patterns across your published posts.
empty.noAudit: No audit has been run yet. Click Re-check to scan your landing page.
empty.noStrategy: No strategy saved yet. Complete onboarding to build one.
empty.noOptimizationChanges: No optimization changes yet — campaigns are still in their learning period or have not run optimization cycles.
empty.noAssets: No assets yet. Upload images or videos to build your library.
empty.noHistory: No history yet — data accumulates month by month.
empty.noImages: No images in library yet. Upload from computer to add.
empty.noPosts: No posts yet. Click "Generate this week's posts" to create content.

connect.title: Connect your ad accounts
connect.subtitle: Connect the platforms you advertise on. You can always add more later — but connecting now means a better strategy from day one.
connect.tiktokDesc: TikTok for Business — In-Feed, Spark, TopView
connect.chooseAccount: Choose which Google Ads account Vigmis should manage:
connect.noAccounts: No Google Ads accounts found. Make sure you have an active account at ads.google.com.
connect.metaHelp: then come back and connect. Need help? Use the chat button below.
connect.tiktokComingSoon: TikTok Ads integration is coming soon — connect Google or Meta for now.
connect.createTikTok: Create a TikTok for Business account →
connect.tiktokHelp: then come back and connect. Need help? Use the chat button below.
connect.termsLabel: By continuing, I agree to Vigmis's Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Acceptable Use Policy (including the AI system limitations described therein). I confirm I am 18 or older.
connect.marketingOptIn: Send me tips and product updates by email. (Optional)
connect.parallelCampaigns: I have active campaigns on these platforms that I am not transferring to Vigmis. (Helps calibrate benchmarks.)
connect.continueZero: Connect at least one platform to continue
connect.sessionError: Session error — please refresh the page

oauthErrors.google_failed: Google connection failed — please try again
oauthErrors.meta_failed: Meta connection failed — please try again
oauthErrors.tiktok_failed: TikTok connection failed — please try again
oauthErrors.tiktok_not_configured: TikTok integration is not yet active — coming soon

analysis.takes: This takes 2–4 minutes. A thorough analysis is worth the wait ☕
analysis.researchingMarket: Researching competitors, market trends, and benchmarks...

websiteCheck.title: Let's make sure we understand your business
websiteCheck.subtitle: Vigmis scanned your website. Here's what we understood — please confirm or add details.
websiteCheck.understood: What Vigmis understood from your website
websiteCheck.notEnough: We couldn't extract enough information from your website to build a confident strategy.
websiteCheck.answersPlaceholder: Answer the questions above — this helps Vigmis build a better strategy...
websiteCheck.addPlaceholder: e.g. Our hero product is the Premium plan. We target small business owners, not individuals...

websiteDescribe.title: Tell us about your business
websiteDescribe.subtitle: We couldn't automatically read your website. This is common with modern platforms like Shopify, Wix, or custom-built sites — it doesn't mean anything is wrong with your site. Just tell us about your business below and we'll create your strategy from your description.
websiteDescribe.vigmisNote: It looks like you entered the Vigmis website. Please enter your own business website instead.
websiteDescribe.label: What does your business do? Who is your target customer?
websiteDescribe.placeholder: e.g. We sell AI-powered marketing software for small e-commerce businesses. Our customers are online store owners who want to automate their ad campaigns...

strategy.basedOn: Based on your website analysis and market research
strategy.creativeBriefSub: What creatives Vigmis will produce for each platform
strategy.recPlatforms: Vigmis recommends adding these platforms based on your business profile:
strategy.organicSub: Organic channels reduce ad dependency over time and improve campaign quality scores.
strategy.whatToChange: What would you like to change?
strategy.vigmisOpinion: Vigmis will share its honest opinion before updating the plan.
strategy.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g. I want to include TikTok, or I'd prefer a lower budget, or focus only on Google Search...
strategy.timelineDay1: Days 1–7: Learning phase — Vigmis collects data before making budget changes. Alerts are active from day 1.
strategy.timelineDay8: Day 8+: Full optimization begins — budget adjustments, creative refresh, targeting review.
strategy.beforeApproveDesc: This is the right moment. Want to change the budget, adjust platforms, tweak the targeting, or push back on any part of the plan? Don't approve if anything feels off.
strategy.askPlaceholder: e.g. Lower the budget, remove Google, focus only on Israel...
strategy.approveConfirm: I confirm that I have reviewed this campaign plan in full. The budget of {budget}/month is my informed decision, made after reviewing Vigmis's analysis and recommendations. I understand that projected outcomes (clicks, leads, conversions) are estimates based on market benchmarks, not guarantees.

creative.title: Creative Assets
creative.subtitle: Your campaign needs visual ads to run. Choose how you want to handle creative.
creative.aiRecText: A talking avatar video builds trust quickly — it works especially well on TikTok and Meta for service businesses.
creative.ownCreativeDesc: Upload images or videos from the dashboard after setup
creative.canChange: You can always add or change creative assets from the dashboard
creative.avatarDesc: A realistic spokesperson presents your business

tracking.title: Install your tracking pixel
tracking.subtitle: Vigmis measures your actual business results, not just what the ad platforms claim. Without this, you only see platform ROAS — which is often 2–3× inflated.
tracking.whyText: Ad platforms like Meta and Google each claim credit for the same sale. The result: your reported ROAS is artificially inflated by 30–200%. Vigmis measures what actually happened on your website — the real number.
tracking.step1: Step 1 — Paste this on every page of your website
tracking.pixelFiring: Pixel is firing correctly. Vigmis is now tracking real conversions on your website.
tracking.afterPasting: After pasting the snippet, visit your website and come back here to verify it's working.
tracking.shopifyDesc: Direct order data = more accurate True ROAS than pixel alone
tracking.shopifyDetails: Connect your Shopify store so Vigmis receives actual order data with exact revenue per campaign — the gold standard for attribution.
tracking.wooCommerce: WooCommerce, Wix, and custom integrations coming soon.
tracking.installLater: You can always install tracking later from the dashboard — campaigns will start even without it.

metaAssets.title: Choose what Vigmis will manage
metaAssets.subtitle: Pick one Facebook Page and one Ad Account. Instagram is optional — only used if your Page has a linked Instagram Business account. You can change all of this later in Dashboard → Social → Connect.
metaAssets.instagramNote: If the Page has a linked Instagram Business account, it'll be used automatically. If not — Vigmis will only publish to Facebook.
metaAssets.noPages: No Pages found. You can continue without one — Meta Ads will still work. To enable social publishing, add a Facebook Page from Dashboard → Social → Connect.
metaAssets.noAdAccounts: Meta returned no Ad Accounts. You need admin access to at least one Ad Account in Business Manager.
metaAssets.changeNote: You can change these selections anytime in Dashboard → Social → Connect.

rethink.title: Rethink your strategy?
rethink.subtitle: This will restart the interview and build a new campaign plan from scratch.
rethink.warning: Your current plan will be replaced.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This cannot be undone.

billing.title: Billing
billing.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
